chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ جَهِلَ أَنْ يَقِفَ بِالْمَشْعَرِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 169 – The one who is ignorant that he should be pausing at the Monuments

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/132)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/132)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ الْأَعْجَمِيُّ وَ الْمَرْأَةُ الضَّعِيفَةُ يَكُونَانِ مَعَ الْجَمَّالِ الْأَعْرَابِيِّ فَإِذَا أَفَاضَ بِهِمْ مِنْ عَرَفَاتٍ مَرَّ بِهِمْ كَمَا مَرَّ بِهِمْ إِلَى مِنًى وَ لَمْ يَنْزِلْ بِهِمْ جَمْعاً فَقَالَ أَ لَيْسَ قَدْ صَلَّوْا بِهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ قُلْتُ وَ إِنْ لَمْ يُصَلُّوا بِهَا قَالَ ذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ فِيهَا فَإِنْ كَانُوا ذَكَرُوا اللَّهَ فِيهَا فَقَدْ أَجْزَأَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu Nasr, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Muhammad Bin Hakeym who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The non-Arab man and the weak woman both happen to be with the Bedouin cameleer. So when he departs with them from Arafaat, he passes with them just as he passed with them to Mina and did not encamp with them at Jam’a’ (place of assembly near Muzdalifah). So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Had they Prayed at it, it would have sufficed them’. I said, ‘And if they did not Pray at it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘They should mention Allah<sup>azwj</sup>. So if they had mentioned Allah<sup>azwj</sup> therein, so it would have sufficed them’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn abu Nasr from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman from Muhammad ibn al-Hakim who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who is a non- Arab with a weak woman and an Arab camel man who takes them to leave ’Arafat and pass along with them through al-Jam‘ (place of assembly al-Muzdalifah) to Mina’, without allowing them to disembark in al-Jam‘. He (the Imam) said, ’Had they been able to perform one Salat (prayer) in it (al-Jam‘) it would have been sufficient for them.’ I then asked, ‘What happens if they cannot perform one Salat (prayer) there ? 5 He (the Imam) said, ‘They can speak of Allah; if they say Dhikr of Allah (speak of Allah), it is sufficient for them. ‘“
